examples: The essence of postmodernism is precisely that we should avoid pointing out essentialist patterns in the past.
He has sponsored a revival of an essentialist programme in metaphysics that traces back to Aristotle and the Scholastics.
Modem science is based upon subject - object dualism, essentialist reductionism and causal determinism. Those are the source of "the crisis of modernity".
I'm not trying to make the essentialist argument that the only good comics are the ones that avoid strategies from other media.
